headline: Apple beats Q4 earnings, announces $110B buyback
body: Apple reported record quarterly revenue.

headline: Apple Vision Pro 2 pre-orders shatter records
body: Demand for Apple mixed reality headset exceeded forecasts.

headline: Microsoft Azure cloud revenue surges 38% year-over-year
body: Strong enterprise AI adoption drove Azure growth.

headline: Microsoft and OpenAI deepen partnership with $20B expansion
body: Extended compute and model access agreement announced.

headline: NVIDIA reports record data center revenue of $36B in Q4
body: Blackwell GPU demand remains insatiable from hyperscalers.

headline: NVIDIA Blackwell B300 chip unveiled, 3x performance leap
body: Next-gen AI chip confirmed for H2 2026 mass production.

headline: Alphabet ad revenue rebounds strongly, YouTube hits record
body: Q1 ad spending surged across search and YouTube.

headline: Google Gemini Ultra 3 launches, benchmarks beat GPT-5
body: Google flagship AI model tops every major benchmark.

headline: Meta Q1 DAU grows to 3.8B, AI feed engagement up 22%
body: Meta family of apps continues to dominate social engagement.

headline: Meta unveils Orion AR glasses for $999, ships Q3 2026
body: Long-awaited consumer AR device revealed at Connect 2026.

headline: JPMorgan reports record trading revenue, raises dividend 12%
body: Strong fixed income and equity trading drove outperformance.

headline: JPMorgan acquires fintech startup for $4.2B, expanding AI banking
body: Deal strengthens JPM retail AI banking capabilities.

headline: Visa transaction volume up 18%, international payments accelerate
body: Cross-border payments growth exceeded analyst estimates.

headline: Visa raises full-year guidance, cites AI fraud prevention gains
body: Lower fraud losses boosted net revenue margin for the quarter.

headline: Mastercard Q1 earnings beat on strong consumer spending
body: Domestic and international spending trends remained robust.

headline: Mastercard expands B2B payment platform to 40 new markets
body: International expansion targets SMB segment in emerging markets.

headline: Amazon AWS Q1 growth reaccelerates to 28%, margin expands
body: Cloud demand from AI workloads drove an acceleration in growth.

headline: Amazon Prime membership hits 350M globally, advertising up 35%
body: Prime Video ad tier continues to outperform expectations.

headline: ExxonMobil benefits from oil price surge, raises quarterly dividend
body: Brent crude above $95/barrel lifted Exxon Q1 earnings.

headline: ExxonMobil authorizes $25B share buyback through 2027
body: Strong cash flows enable continued capital returns to shareholders.

headline: Pfizer Phase 3 trial for oncology drug fails primary endpoint
body: The drug missed its primary overall survival endpoint.

headline: Pfizer Q1 revenue misses estimates, COVID product revenue collapses
body: Ongoing normalization of COVID-related products weighs on results.

headline: Merck faces accelerated generic competition for top-selling drug
body: Patent cliff on Keytruda extended indications weighs on outlook.

headline: Merck cuts 2026 EPS guidance on pricing pressure from IRA
body: Drug pricing legislation impact larger than previously guided.

headline: Goldman Sachs Q1 trading revenue misses estimates by wide margin
body: Fixed income trading declined sharply amid rate uncertainty.

headline: Goldman Sachs faces regulatory scrutiny over Marcus consumer unit wind-down
body: Federal Reserve reviewing process for winding down consumer lending.

headline: Chevron lowers capital spending amid oil demand concerns
body: CVX cuts 2026 capex by $3B on weaker long-term demand forecasts.

headline: Chevron production targets revised lower as Kazakhstan output disappoints
body: TCO field delays push Chevron to lower full-year production guidance.

headline: ConocoPhillips cuts production guidance on softening crude prices
body: Lower WTI prices prompt COP to reduce drilling activity.

headline: ConocoPhillips misses Q1 EPS estimate, analyst downgrades pile in
body: Three sell-side analysts downgraded COP following earnings miss.

headline: Bank of America faces DOJ investigation over discriminatory lending practices
body: Federal investigation expands to cover mortgage and auto lending.

headline: Bank of America credit loss provisions spike 85% as consumer defaults rise
body: BAC raises loan loss reserves sharply amid deteriorating credit quality.

headline: Bank of America CEO faces Senate hearing over risk management failures
body: Senate Banking Committee summons BAC leadership to testify.

headline: DOJ launches antitrust probe into UnitedHealth Group hospital pricing
body: Wide-ranging federal investigation targets UNH integrated care model.

headline: UnitedHealth Q1 earnings miss badly as Medicare Advantage costs surge
body: Medical loss ratio spiked to 87.8%, worst in 10 years.

headline: CMS proposes 5% Medicare Advantage rate cut for 2027, UNH hardest hit
body: Proposed cut far exceeds analyst estimates and would dent UNH margins.

headline: Johnson & Johnson pipeline update: 2 mid-stage trials show mixed results
body: MedTech and pharma pipeline news was a net neutral for investors.

headline: J&J talc litigation settlement delayed by appeals court ruling
body: Ongoing liability uncertainty prevents final resolution of talc suits.

headline: AbbVie Skyrizi label expansion approved in new indication
body: FDA approved Skyrizi for a new dermatology use, modest upside.

headline: AbbVie Humira biosimilar erosion accelerates, guidance lowered slightly
body: Biosimilar uptake exceeded internal models, offsetting Skyrizi growth.

headline: Tesla Q1 deliveries miss estimates by 12%, shares fall in premarket
body: Global delivery numbers came in below consensus on demand concerns.

headline: Tesla retains strong US EV market share despite BYD global pressure
body: Despite global competition, Tesla maintained its domestic leadership.
